unity_create_gameobject.title: Create GameObject
unity_create_gameobject.description: Create a new GameObject in Unity scene. Note: Auto-retries on connection failure during Unity recompilation.

unity_update_gameobject.title: Update GameObject
unity_update_gameobject.description: Update properties of an existing GameObject

unity_delete_gameobject.title: Delete GameObject
unity_delete_gameobject.description: Delete a GameObject from the scene

name.description: Name of the GameObject to delete

unity_instantiate_prefab.title: Instantiate Prefab
unity_instantiate_prefab.description: Instantiate a prefab or FBX asset from the project into the scene. Supports any asset path including .prefab and .fbx files.

name.description: Name for the instantiated GameObject (defaults to asset name)

unity_set_transform.title: Set Transform
unity_set_transform.description: Set position, rotation, and scale of a GameObject

unity_add_component.title: Add Component
unity_add_component.description: Add a component to a GameObject

unity_update_component.title: Update Component
unity_update_component.description: Update component properties. Use gameObject for target object name and component for component type.

unity_create_virtual_camera.title: Create Cinemachine Virtual Camera
unity_create_virtual_camera.description: Create a Cinemachine Virtual Camera with follow and look at targets

unity_create_freelook_camera.title: Create Cinemachine FreeLook Camera
unity_create_freelook_camera.description: Create a Cinemachine FreeLook Camera for third-person orbiting. REQUIRED: "follow" parameter must specify an existing GameObject name in the scene. The target GameObject must exist before creating the camera. Example: unity_create_freelook_camera({name: "PlayerCamera", follow: "Player"}). Will fail if follow target does not exist.

follow.description: GameObject name to follow and orbit around (REQUIRED - must exist in scene before calling this tool)

lookAt.description: GameObject to look at (defaults to follow target)

unity_setup_cinemachine_brain.title: Setup Cinemachine Brain
unity_setup_cinemachine_brain.description: Setup Cinemachine Brain on a camera (required for Cinemachine to work)

unity_update_virtual_camera.title: Update Virtual Camera Settings
unity_update_virtual_camera.description: Update settings of an existing Cinemachine Virtual Camera

unity_create_dolly_track.title: Create Cinemachine Dolly Track
unity_create_dolly_track.description: Create a Cinemachine Dolly Track with waypoints for camera path animation

cameraName.description: Virtual camera to attach to track

unity_add_collider_extension.title: Add Cinemachine Collider Extension
unity_add_collider_extension.description: Add Collider Extension to Virtual Camera for obstacle avoidance

unity_add_confiner_extension.title: Add Cinemachine Confiner Extension
unity_add_confiner_extension.description: Add Confiner Extension to restrict camera movement within bounds

boundingVolume.description: GameObject with Collider defining the bounds

unity_create_state_driven_camera.title: Create Cinemachine State-Driven Camera
unity_create_state_driven_camera.description: Create a State-Driven Camera that switches based on Animator state

unity_create_clear_shot_camera.title: Create Cinemachine Clear Shot Camera
unity_create_clear_shot_camera.description: Create a Clear Shot Camera for dynamic shot selection with obstacle avoidance

unity_create_impulse_source.title: Create Cinemachine Impulse Source
unity_create_impulse_source.description: Create an Impulse Source for triggering camera shake effects

impulseDuration.description: Duration of the impulse in seconds

unity_add_impulse_listener.title: Add Cinemachine Impulse Listener
unity_add_impulse_listener.description: Add an Impulse Listener extension to a virtual camera to receive shake effects

camera.description: Name of the Virtual Camera to add listener to

unity_create_blend_list_camera.title: Create Cinemachine Blend List Camera
unity_create_blend_list_camera.description: Create a Blend List Camera that manages a prioritized list of child virtual cameras

unity_create_target_group.title: Create Cinemachine Target Group

unity_update_camera_target.title: Update Cinemachine Camera Target
unity_update_camera_target.description: Update Follow and/or LookAt targets of a Cinemachine camera

follow.description: New Follow target (empty string to clear)

lookAt.description: New LookAt target (empty string to clear)

unity_update_brain_blend_settings.title: Update Cinemachine Brain Blend Settings
unity_update_brain_blend_settings.description: Update the default blend settings on the Cinemachine Brain

unity_create_prefab.title: Create Prefab

unity_load_scene.title: Load Scene
unity_load_scene.description: 🎬 Load a scene in Editor mode. Supports Single (replace current) or Additive (load alongside current) modes. Can load by path or name.

setActive.description: Set as active scene after loading (Additive mode only)

unity_unload_scene.title: Unload Scene

unity_create_shader_property_animator.description: Animate shader properties like color, float, or vector values

unity_create_film_grain.title: Create Film Grain Effect
unity_create_film_grain.description: 🎬 Create film grain effect with auto-generated shader - Adds cinematic film texture!

unity_create_motion_blur.description: 💨 Create motion blur effect with auto-generated shader - Adds dynamic motion feel!

unity_create_depth_of_field.title: Create Depth of Field Effect
unity_create_depth_of_field.description: 📷 Create depth of field effect with auto-generated shader - Professional camera focus!

unity_create_vfx_graph.title: Create VFX / Particle Effect
unity_create_vfx_graph.description: Create VFX particle effects with advanced features. Supports mesh spawning, SDF shapes, splines, custom output modes. Uses VFX Graph (GPU) if available, otherwise Particle System.

name.description: Custom name for the VFX GameObject

particleCount.description: Maximum particle count (GPU can handle millions!)

shapeType.description: Advanced spawn shape (requires VFX Graph package)

meshName.description: Name of GameObject in scene to use as mesh source

unity_create_shader_graph.title: Create Shader Graph
unity_create_shader_graph.description: 🎭 Create Shader Graph with natural language - Custom materials made easy!

unity_set_vfx_property.title: Set VFX Graph Property
unity_set_vfx_property.description: Modify exposed properties of a VFX Graph at runtime. Change colors, intensity, particle count, etc.

gameObjectName.description: Name of GameObject with VisualEffect component

unity_get_vfx_properties.title: Get VFX Graph Properties
unity_get_vfx_properties.description: Get all exposed properties of a VFX Graph. See available parameters for modification.

gameObjectName.description: Name of GameObject with VisualEffect component

unity_trigger_vfx_event.description: Send event to VFX Graph (play, stop, custom events)

gameObjectName.description: Name of GameObject with VisualEffect component

eventName.description: Event name (OnPlay, OnStop, or custom event)

unity_vfx_create.title: Create VFX Graph
unity_vfx_create.description: Create a new VFX Graph asset. This is the first step for building custom VFX.

name.description: Name of the VFX Graph asset

folder.description: Folder path to save the asset

unity_vfx_add_context.title: Add VFX Context
unity_vfx_add_context.description: Add a context (Spawn, Initialize, Update, Output) to VFX Graph. Contexts define the particle lifecycle.

unity_vfx_add_block.title: Add VFX Block
unity_vfx_add_block.description: Add a block to a context. Blocks define particle behavior (position, velocity, color, forces, etc.)

contextIndex.description: Index of context to add block to (0-based)

unity_vfx_add_operator.title: Add VFX Operator
unity_vfx_add_operator.description: Add an operator node to VFX Graph. Operators perform calculations (math, noise, sampling, etc.)

unity_vfx_link_contexts.title: Link VFX Contexts
unity_vfx_link_contexts.description: Link two contexts together (e.g., Spawn -> Initialize -> Update -> Output)

unity_vfx_get_structure.title: Get VFX Structure
unity_vfx_get_structure.description: Get the structure of a VFX Graph (contexts, blocks, operators)

unity_vfx_compile.title: Compile VFX
unity_vfx_compile.description: Compile and save the VFX Graph

unity_vfx_get_available_types.title: Get Available VFX Types
unity_vfx_get_available_types.description: List all available context, block, and operator types

unity_vfx_add_parameter.title: Add VFX Parameter
unity_vfx_add_parameter.description: Add an exposed parameter to VFX Graph that can be controlled from Inspector or scripts

exposed.description: Whether parameter is exposed in Inspector

unity_vfx_connect_slots.title: Connect VFX Slots
unity_vfx_connect_slots.description: Connect output slot of one node to input slot of another (operator->block, parameter->operator, etc.)

sourceSlotIndex.description: Index of output slot on source

targetNodeIndex.description: Index of target node (for blocks: contextIndex << 16 | blockIndex)

targetSlotIndex.description: Index of input slot on target

unity_vfx_set_attribute.title: Set VFX Block Attribute
unity_vfx_set_attribute.description: Set attribute value on a SetAttribute block (position, velocity, color, size, lifetime, etc.)

contextIndex.description: Index of context containing the block

blockIndex.description: Index of SetAttribute block within context

attribute.description: Attribute name (position, velocity, color, size, lifetime, alpha, angle, etc.)

composition.description: How to combine with existing value

unity_vfx_create_preset.title: Create VFX Preset
unity_vfx_create_preset.description: Create a complete VFX Graph from preset (fire, smoke, sparks, trail, explosion)

unity_vfx_configure_output.title: Configure VFX Output
unity_vfx_configure_output.description: Configure VFX output context settings (texture, blend mode, soft particles, etc.)

unity_vfx_set_color_gradient.title: Set VFX Color Gradient
unity_vfx_set_color_gradient.description: Set color gradient for ColorOverLife or similar blocks

contextIndex.description: Index of the context containing the block

times.description: Array of time values (0-1), defaults to evenly distributed

unity_setup_lighting_scenarios.description: 💡 Create lighting scenarios for different moods - From dawn to midnight!

unity_create_weather_system.description: 🌦️ Create complete weather system with cinematic presets - One command for movie-quality weather!

unity_set_weather_preset.description: Smoothly transition to a different weather preset

unity_create_rain_effect.description: Create realistic rain effect with particle system

unity_create_snow_effect.title: Create Snow Effect
unity_create_snow_effect.description: Create snow effect with falling snowflakes

unity_create_wind_effect.title: Create Wind Effect
unity_create_wind_effect.description: Create wind effect affecting objects and particles

unity_create_lightning_effect.title: Create Lightning Effect
unity_create_lightning_effect.description: Create lightning strikes with flash effects

unity_create_thunderstorm.title: Create Thunderstorm
unity_create_thunderstorm.description: Create complete thunderstorm with rain, wind, lightning and fog

unity_create_time_of_day.title: Create Time of Day System
unity_create_time_of_day.description: Create dynamic day-night cycle with sun and moon movement

dayDuration.description: Duration of full day cycle in seconds

unity_set_time_of_day.title: Set Time of Day
unity_set_time_of_day.description: Set specific time in the day-night cycle

unity_create_day_night_preset.title: Create Day Night Preset
unity_create_day_night_preset.description: Apply preset lighting conditions for different environments

unity_create_skybox_blend.title: Create Skybox Blend
unity_create_skybox_blend.description: Blend between day and night skyboxes

unity_create_skybox_from_image.title: Create Skybox from Image
unity_create_skybox_from_image.description: Create a Skybox from image(s). Supports: (1) Panoramic/HDRI - single 360° equirectangular image, (2) 6-Sided - six face textures, (3) Sphere/Dome - regular landscape photo on inverted sphere (best for non-360 photos)

type.description: Skybox type: panoramic/hdri for 360° image, 6sided/cubemap for 6 faces, sphere/dome/landscape for regular photos on inverted sphere

applyToScene.description: Apply material to scene RenderSettings skybox (for sphere type)

followCamera.description: Make sphere follow camera position (for sphere/dome type)

applyToCamera.description: Apply material to MainCamera skybox (for sphere type)

unity_create_time_event.title: Create Time Event
unity_create_time_event.description: Create events triggered at specific times

unity_search.title: Search Objects
unity_search.description: Search for objects in the scene

unity_get_scene_info.title: Get Scene Information
unity_get_scene_info.description: Get comprehensive information about the current Unity scene including hierarchy, statistics, lighting, and cameras. Now includes detailed Transform data (world/local position, rotation, scale) and RectTransform data (anchors, pivot, sizeDelta, rect) for all GameObjects. WARNING: Can return large response (>1MB) for complex scenes. For large scenes, use unity_get_scene_summary instead.

unity_get_scene_summary.title: Get Scene Summary (Lightweight)
unity_get_scene_summary.description: Get lightweight scene overview (<200KB). Returns: scene name, GameObject count, cameras, lights, root GameObjects list (max 50). Recommended for large scenes instead of unity_get_scene_info.

unity_get_gameobjects_list.title: Get Filtered GameObjects List
unity_get_gameobjects_list.description: Get filtered list of GameObjects (<50KB). Returns GameObject names, IDs, paths, layers, tags. Supports filters: layer, tag, name (contains), activeOnly. Max 100 results.

unity_get_gameobject_detail.title: Get GameObject Detailed Information
unity_get_gameobject_detail.description: Get detailed information for a specific GameObject (<10KB). Returns: transform, components with details, children, parent. Find GameObject by name or instanceId (use unity_get_gameobjects_list first to get IDs).

unity_get_scene_changes_since.title: Get Incremental Scene Changes
unity_get_scene_changes_since.description: Get scene changes since a timestamp. Returns: added, removed, modified GameObjects. Use for efficient scene monitoring. On first call or if timestamp too old, returns full scene summary.

unity_capture_game_view.title: Capture Game View Screenshot
unity_capture_game_view.description: Capture a screenshot of the Unity Game View including all Canvas/UI elements. WORKFLOW: 1) Call this tool → returns "status: pending" if Play mode transition needed. 2) DO NOT CALL ANY OTHER TOOLS. WAIT EXACTLY 3 SECONDS. This is REQUIRED for Play mode transition and rendering stabilization. 3) After 3 seconds, call unity_get_screenshot_result to retrieve the actual screenshot path and resolution. CRITICAL: The screenshot is NOT complete until you retrieve the result with unity_get_screenshot_re

unity_capture_scene_view.title: Capture Scene View Screenshot
unity_capture_scene_view.description: Capture a screenshot of the Unity Scene View. The image is saved to Assets/Screenshots and can be analyzed by Claude Vision. Returns the file path for immediate analysis.

unity_capture_region.title: Capture Specific Region Screenshot
unity_capture_region.description: Capture a screenshot of a specific region within Unity Game View or Scene View. Useful for capturing specific UI elements or areas. WORKFLOW for view="game": 1) Call this tool → returns "status: pending" if Play mode transition needed. 2) DO NOT CALL ANY OTHER TOOLS. WAIT EXACTLY 3 SECONDS for Play mode transition and rendering stabilization. 3) After 3 seconds, call unity_get_screenshot_result to retrieve result. CRITICAL: The capture is NOT complete until you retrieve the result with unity_get

x.description: X coordinate of the region (top-left corner)

y.description: Y coordinate of the region (top-left corner)

width.description: Width of the region in pixels

height.description: Height of the region in pixels

unity_get_screenshot_result.title: Get Screenshot Result
unity_get_screenshot_result.description: Retrieve the result of a screenshot capture operation that required Play mode transition. WORKFLOW: When unity_capture_game_view or unity_capture_region returns {"status": "pending"}, Unity is entering Play mode to capture Canvas/UI. Wait EXACTLY 3 SECONDS, then call THIS tool to retrieve the actual screenshot result including file path, width, and height. Returns {"status": "capturing"} if still in progress (you called too early - wait more), {"status": "no_result"} if no capture pending.

unity_capture_grid.title: Capture Game View as Grid
unity_capture_grid.description: Automatically split and capture the Game View into a grid of multiple screenshots. Useful for analyzing different areas of the UI systematically. WORKFLOW: 1) Call this tool with grid size (e.g., "2x2", "3x3"). 2) If returns "status: pending", WAIT EXACTLY 3 SECONDS for Play mode transition. 3) Call unity_get_screenshot_result to retrieve all grid files. Returns multiple image files (one for each grid cell) with their positions.

basename.description: Base name for output files (default: Grid_timestamp). Files will be named basename_r0_c0.png, basename_r0_c1.png, etc.

unity_capture_ui_element.title: Capture Specific UI Element
unity_capture_ui_element.description: Capture a specific UI element by its GameObject name. Automatically finds the element, calculates its screen bounds, and captures just that region. WORKFLOW: 1) Call this tool with the GameObject name (e.g., "MoveButton", "HealthBar"). 2) If returns "status: pending", WAIT EXACTLY 3 SECONDS for Play mode transition. 3) Call unity_get_screenshot_result to retrieve the captured element. Works with Canvas Overlay, Camera, and World Space render modes.

unity_force_refresh_assets.title: Force Refresh Assets
unity_force_refresh_assets.description: Force Unity to refresh the asset database and recompile scripts. IMPORTANT: Before using this tool after editing .cs files, always run unity_analyze_console_logs with logType:"error" to check for syntax/compile errors. If errors exist, fix them first. Only refresh when error-free. Essential after modifying .cs files to ensure changes are recognized before invoking methods.

unity_invoke_context_menu.title: Invoke ContextMenu Method
unity_invoke_context_menu.description: Invoke a method decorated with [ContextMenu] attribute on a component. Perfect for triggering custom editor actions like BuildLayout(), GenerateUI(), etc. WORKFLOW: 1) Edit code 2) unity_analyze_console_logs(error) 3) Fix errors if any 4) unity_force_refresh_assets 5) unity_analyze_console_logs(error) 6) Use this tool. This ensures error-free execution.

gameObjectName.description: Name of the GameObject containing the component (optional, will search scene if not provided)

unity_execute_menu_item.title: Execute Menu Item
unity_execute_menu_item.description: Execute a Unity Editor menu item by its path. Use this to trigger any Unity menu action programmatically. Examples: "Edit/Preferences", "Window/Package Manager", "Assets/Refresh", "File/Save Project", "Tools/Synaptic Pro/AI Reconnect".

unity_console.title: Console Operations

unity_analyze_console_logs.title: Analyze Console Logs
unity_analyze_console_logs.description: Detailed analysis of Unity console logs with file paths, line numbers and stack traces. CRITICAL: Always use this BEFORE unity_force_refresh_assets when you edit .cs files - check for syntax/compile errors with logType:"error". This prevents compilation failures and ensures clean workflows. Returns detailed error info including file paths and line numbers for easy fixing. Supports filtering to reduce token usage: excludeSynaptic (default true) hides internal logs, filter/exclude for custom patterns, groupByMessage to deduplicate repeated logs.

filter.description: Include only logs containing this text (case-insensitive)

exclude.description: Exclude logs containing these patterns (comma-separated, case-insensitive)

groupByMessage.description: Group duplicate messages and show count instead of repeating

scriptPath.description: Full path to script (e.g., Assets/Scripts/MyScript.cs) - use this OR fileName

fileName.description: Just the script name (e.g., MyScript.cs or MyScript) - use this OR scriptPath

operation.description: Type of modification: replace=overwrite entire file content, insert=add at specific position, append=add to end, prepend=add to beginning

content.description: New content to add or replace. For replace operation, this will become the entire file content

searchText.description: Text to search for when using replace or insert operations

unity_edit_script_line.title: Edit Script Line
unity_edit_script_line.description: Edit a specific line in a Unity script.

scriptPath.description: Full path (e.g., Assets/Scripts/MyScript.cs) - use this OR fileName

fileName.description: Script name (e.g., MyScript.cs or just MyScript) - use this OR scriptPath

unity_add_script_method.title: Add Script Method
unity_add_script_method.description: Add a new method to a Unity script.

scriptPath.description: Full path (e.g., Assets/Scripts/MyScript.cs) - use this OR fileName

fileName.description: Script name (e.g., MyScript.cs or just MyScript) - use this OR scriptPath

methodName.description: Name of the method to add

methodContent.description: Complete method implementation with proper indentation

insertAfter.description: Insert after this method/pattern (optional, defaults to end of class)

unity_update_script_variable.title: Update Script Variable
unity_update_script_variable.description: Update variable declaration or value in a Unity script.

fileName.description: Name of the script file to find

variableName.description: Name of the variable to update

updateType.description: Update type: declaration or just value

unity_read_script.title: Read Script Content
unity_read_script.description: 🔍 Search for patterns across multiple script files using regex. Similar to grep command. Returns matching lines with file paths, line numbers, and context. Supports case-insensitive search and context lines.

scriptPath.description: Full path (e.g., Assets/Scripts/MyScript.cs) - use this OR fileName

fileName.description: Script name (e.g., MyScript or MyScript.cs) - use this OR scriptPath

unity_grep_scripts.title: Grep Search in Scripts
unity_grep_scripts.description: 🔍 Search for patterns across multiple script files using regex. Similar to grep command. Returns matching lines with file paths, line numbers, and context. Supports case-insensitive search and context lines.

contextLines.description: Number of context lines to show (like grep -C)

maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return

unity_read_script_range.title: Read Script Range
unity_read_script_range.description: 📄 Read a specific range of lines from a script file. Useful for large files where you only need to see a portion. Like using head/tail/sed commands.

limit.description: Maximum number of lines to read

offset.description: Number of lines to skip from start

unity_search_code.title: Search Code in Project
unity_search_code.description: 🔎 Search for code patterns across the entire Unity project. Can search in specific directories, filter by file types, and group results by file. More comprehensive than grep_scripts.

unity_list_script_files.title: List Script Files
unity_list_script_files.description: 📁 List script files in the project with glob pattern support. Can filter by directory, pattern, and sort by various criteria. Like using find or ls commands.

unity_analyze_script.title: Analyze Script Quality
unity_analyze_script.description: 🔍 Comprehensive script analysis tool that checks for syntax errors, code quality issues, Unity-specific problems, and provides improvement suggestions. Detects: bracket mismatches, long methods, unused variables, performance issues in Update(), null reference risks, naming conventions, and more. Use this to identify issues before modifying scripts.

scriptPath.description: Full path to script (e.g., Assets/Scripts/MyScript.cs) - use this OR fileName

fileName.description: Just the script name (e.g., MyScript.cs or MyScript) - use this OR scriptPath

unity_analyze_performance.title: Performance Diagnostic Tool
unity_analyze_performance.description: ⚡ Comprehensive performance analysis tool that detects expensive operations in Update loops, excessive GameObject.Find usage, inefficient coroutines, string performance issues, LINQ allocations, Draw Call problems, mesh/texture optimization opportunities, lighting issues, and UI performance bottlenecks. Provides detailed recommendations for optimization.

scriptPath.description: Full path to script to analyze (e.g., Assets/Scripts/MyScript.cs) - use this OR fileName

fileName.description: Just the script name (e.g., MyScript.cs or MyScript) - use this OR scriptPath

target.description: GameObject name to analyze specifically (if not provided, analyzes entire scene)

unity_check_best_practices.title: Best Practices Checker
unity_check_best_practices.description: ✅ Analyzes Unity scripts for compliance with Unity official guidelines, coding standards, security issues, and architectural patterns. Detects: Resources.Load usage, magic numbers, singleton patterns, API key hardcoding, PlayerPrefs security issues, high coupling, large classes, and provides compliance scoring with detailed recommendations.

scriptPath.description: Full path to script (e.g., Assets/Scripts/MyScript.cs) - use this OR fileName

fileName.description: Just the script name (e.g., MyScript.cs or MyScript) - use this OR scriptPath

unity_monitor_runtime_errors.title: Monitor Runtime Errors
unity_monitor_runtime_errors.description: 🔴 Real-time runtime error monitoring and analysis tool. Detects and categorizes: NullReferenceException, IndexOutOfRange, MissingReference, and other runtime errors. Provides error patterns, stack trace analysis, affected files, potential issues detection (deep hierarchies, self-references), and specific solutions for each error type. Essential for debugging and error prevention.

timeWindow.description: Time window in seconds to analyze errors (default: 60)

analyzeStackTrace.description: Analyze stack traces for patterns (default: true)

unity_auto_attach_ui.title: Auto Attach UI Elements
unity_auto_attach_ui.description: Automatically attach UI elements to component fields based on naming conventions

target.description: Name of the GameObject with the component (e.g., TetrisGameManager)

component.description: Component name (optional, will find first custom component if not specified)

unity_setup_ui_canvas.title: Setup UI Canvas
unity_setup_ui_canvas.description: Configure UI Canvas with different render modes (overlay, camera, world) and settings

pixelsPerUnit.description: Pixels per unit for constant-physical mode

unity_set_ui_anchor.title: Set UI Anchor
unity_set_ui_anchor.description: Set UI element anchor presets or custom anchor values for RectTransform

keepPosition.description: Keep current position when applying preset

keepSize.description: Keep current size when applying preset

unity_dynamic_inspect.title: Dynamic Inspect
unity_dynamic_inspect.description: Dynamically inspect any Unity object, component, scene, or project assets. Use this to discover what properties are available before modifying them.

unity_dynamic_modify.title: Dynamic Modify
unity_dynamic_modify.description: Dynamically modify any property of a Unity component using property paths. Use unity_dynamic_inspect first to discover available properties.

createIfMissing.description: Add component if it does not exist

unity_dynamic_create.title: Dynamic Create
unity_dynamic_create.description: Create GameObjects, instantiate prefabs, load scenes, or add components. Universal creation tool.

scene.description: Scene name or path to load

component.description: Component type to add (for component type)
